entry.title: MÁDARA Grow & Fix Brow & Lash Booster, 4,25ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Brow Serum
Price: 26.90

This double-action serum recharges your brows and lashes with length, shine and volume to create a fuller and healthier look.

Shapes and fixes your brows for any desired look.

How to use: Use on brows and lashes to boost hair growth, fix and add shine. Apply on bare lashes or brows, or use it as the finishing touch on your brows to fix the hairs in place. Shake before use.

Ingredients: AQUA; CANTHARELLUS CIBARIUS (CHANTERELLE) EXTRACT*; PULLULAN; GLYCERIN**; PISUM SATIVUM PEPTIDE; SORBITOL; URTICA DIOICA (NETTLE) LEAF EXTRACT*; ZINC PCA; SCLEROTIUM GUM; CAFFEINE; SODIUM LEVULINATE; ACACIA SENEGAL GUM; SODIUM BENZOATE; POTASSIUM HYDROXIDE; HEXAPEPTIDE-11; TREHALOSE; LEUCONOSTOC/RADISH ROOT FERMENT FILTRATE; SODIUM PHYTATE; AROMA; POTASSIUM SORBATE; SODIUM HYALURONATE

99% Natural origin of total

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**Made using organic ingredients

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Come Closer Infinite Lash Mascara, 6ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Mascara
Price: 22.90

Discover the outstanding combination of effortless volume and well-defined separation with the Come Closer Infinite Lash Mascara. 

The natural certified formula stars vegan waxes to ensure smooth application and lasting performance, while plant-derived peptides and organic castor oil encourage fuller, stronger lashes over time.

Featuring a unique conical shape, the classic fibre brush coats each lash in jet black, all-natural pigment to give enviable volume, length and definition.

How to use: Apply one coat to clean lashes for a natural look, or use in layers to intensify. 

Ingredients: AQUA; CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES)***; STEARIC ACID; HELIANTHUS ANNUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED CERA; GLYCERIN**; COPERNICIA CERIFERA (CARNAUBA) WAX; OLEA EUROPAEA (OLIVE) OIL UNSAPONIFIABLES; GLYCERYL ROSINATE; CELLULOSE; PENTYLENE GLYCOL; PULLULAN; OCTYLDODECANOL; GLYCERYL STEARATE; PISUM SATIVUM PEPTIDE; POLYGLYCERYL-10 LAURATE; SORBITOL; RHUS VERNICIFLUA PEEL CERA/RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT CERA; SHOREA ROBUSTA RESIN; GLYCERYL CAPRYLATE/ CAPRATE; PALMITIC ACID; POTASSIUM HYDROXIDE; ACACIA SENEGAL GUM; MAGNESIUM STEARATE; XANTHAN GUM; TREHALOSE; CITRIC ACID; LEUCONOSTOC/RADISH ROOT FERMENT FILTRATE; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL*

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**Made using Organic ingredients
***Pure mineral pigments
99% Natural origin of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Deep Matter Bold Volume Mascara, 6ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Mascara
Price: 22.90

Intensify your gaze with this buildable, high-performance mascara featuring all-natural pigments for a jet black finish. Packed with nourishing actives, it reinforces your lashes while creating phenomenal volume, definition and length. The high-definition wand reaches even the tiniest of lashes, while the formula uses natural vegan waxes and plant-derived peptides for easy application and incredible lasting power. 

How to use: Apply one coat for a classic, natural look, or add more coats for extra intensity.

Ingredients: AQUA; CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES)***; STEARIC ACID; HELIANTHUS ANNUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED CERA; GLYCERIN**; COPERNICIA CERIFERA (CARNAUBA) WAX; OLEA EUROPAEA (OLIVE) OIL UNSAPONIFIABLES; GLYCERYL ROSINATE; CELLULOSE; PENTYLENE GLYCOL; PULLULAN; OCTYLDODECANOL; GLYCERYL STEARATE; PISUM SATIVUM PEPTIDE; POLYGLYCERYL-10 LAURATE; SORBITOL; RHUS VERNICIFLUA PEEL CERA/RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT CERA; SHOREA ROBUSTA RESIN; GLYCERYL CAPRYLATE/ CAPRATE; PALMITIC ACID; POTASSIUM HYDROXIDE; ACACIA SENEGAL GUM; MAGNESIUM STEARATE; XANTHAN GUM; TREHALOSE; CITRIC ACID; LEUCONOSTOC/RADISH ROOT FERMENT FILTRATE; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL*

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**Made using Organic ingredients
***Pure mineral pigments
99% Natural origin of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Velvet Wear Matte Cream Lipstick, #33 Magma
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Lipstick
Price: 24.90

This velvety, ultra-spreadable lipstick glides onto the lips easily and effortlessly, ensuring a beautiful colour payoff, comfortable wear and soft satin finish. The antioxidant-bursting formula with blueberry seed oil and shea butter nurtures and protects the skin, ensuring smooth and silky lips. This lipstick is formulated with pure mineral pigments, leaving out synthetic and animal-derived colourants.

How to use: Use elaborately for a classic matte lip look. Apply carelessly and dab it in with fingers to achieve the trendy lip stain effect. Top with your favourite lip gloss for extra shine and dimension.

You can also apply it onto your eyelids and cheeks for a monochrome makeup look.

Ingredients: ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL; VEGETABLE OIL; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL; COCO-CAPRYLATE; DICAPRYLYL CARBONATE; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED WAX; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN WAX; RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT WAX; CAPRYLOYL GLYCERIN/SEBACIC ACID COPOLYMER; CELLULOSE; POLYGLYCERYL-2 TRIISOSTEARATE; SILICA; RHUS VERNICIFLUA PEEL CERA/RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT CERA; TOCOPHEROL; AROMA; BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*; ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE; GLYCOLIPIDS; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS (BLUEBERRY) SEED OIL*; BETAINE; STEVIA REBAUDIANA EXTRACT; TRICALCIUM PHOSPHATE; VANILLIN; CITRUS AURANTIUM PEEL OIL; LIMONENE**; MICA (CI 77019); CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES); CI 77492 (IRON OXIDES); CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES); CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) ; TIN OXIDE; CI 77742 (MANGANESE VIOLET)***

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**From natural essential oils
***Pure mineral pigments

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Dazzle Nights Satin Shine Lipstick, #503 Charisma 3.8g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Lipstick
Price: 24.90

Drench your lips in dreamy, pigment-loaded colour and subtle lustre that pay homage to the glistening textures and bold hues of the 80s.

The opulent, vegan formula made with nourishing oils, shea butter and vitamins C+E  goes on smooth, wearing off gradually and delicately while hydrating lips from the inside out. 

Formulated with pure mineral pigments, leaving out synthetic or animal-derived colourants. Dermatologically tested.

How to use: Apply directly to clean, moisturised lips. 

Ingredients: OCTYLDODECANOL; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL; POLYGLYCERYL-2 TRIISOSTEARATE; SORBITAN OLIVATE; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL; VEGETABLE OIL; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED WAX; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN WAX; RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT WAX; CAPRYLOYL GLYCERIN/SEBACIC ACID COPOLYMER; CELLULOSE; DILINOLEIC ACID/PROPANEDIOL COPOLYMER; GLYCERYL ROSINATE; AROMA; DIPALMITOYL HYDROXYPROLINE; TOCOPHEROL; BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*; MICA (CI 77019)***; RHUS VERNICIFLUA PEEL CERA/RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT CERA; IRVINGIA GABONENSIS KERNEL BUTTER; HYDROGENATED COCO-GLYCERIDES; ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS (BLUEBERRY) SEED OIL*; GLYCOLIPIDS; STEVIA REBAUDIANA EXTRACT; LIMONENE**; TIN OXIDE (CI 77681)***; CI 77742 (MANGANESE VIOLET)***; CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) ***; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES)***; CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES)***

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**From natural essential oils
***Pure mineral pigments

100% Natural origin of total
10% Organic of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Dazzle Nights Satin Shine Lipstick, #501 Flattery 3,8g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Lipstick
Price: 24.90

Drench your lips in dreamy, pigment-loaded colour and subtle lustre that pay homage to the glistening textures and bold hues of the 80s.

The opulent, vegan formula made with nourishing oils, shea butter and vitamins C+E  goes on smooth, wearing off gradually and delicately while hydrating lips from the inside out. 

Formulated with pure mineral pigments, leaving out synthetic or animal-derived colourants. Dermatologically tested.

How to use: Apply directly to clean, moisturised lips. For an extra glossy finish, layer MÁDARA Glossy Venom Hydrating Lip Gloss on top.

Ingredients: OCTYLDODECANOL; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL; POLYGLYCERYL-2 TRIISOSTEARATE; SORBITAN OLIVATE; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL; VEGETABLE OIL; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED WAX; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN WAX; RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT WAX; CAPRYLOYL GLYCERIN/SEBACIC ACID COPOLYMER; CELLULOSE; DILINOLEIC ACID/PROPANEDIOL COPOLYMER; GLYCERYL ROSINATE; MICA (CI 77019)***; AROMA; DIPALMITOYL HYDROXYPROLINE; TOCOPHEROL; BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*; RHUS VERNICIFLUA PEEL CERA/RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT CERA; IRVINGIA GABONENSIS KERNEL BUTTER; HYDROGENATED COCO-GLYCERIDES; ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS (BLUEBERRY) SEED OIL*; GLYCOLIPIDS; STEVIA REBAUDIANA EXTRACT; LIMONENE**; TIN OXIDE (CI 77681)***; CI 77742 (MANGANESE VIOLET)***; CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) ***; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES)***

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**From natural essential oils
***Pure mineral pigments

100% Natural origin of total
8% Organic of total

entry.title: MÁDARA Midsummer Soft Silk Mineral Bronzer #1 Heat 9g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Mineral Bronzer
Price: 24.90

Achieve a naturally sun-kissed appearance with this silky mineral powder bronzer. The talc-free formula, enriched with coated pigments and glistening mineral particles, adapts to your skin's texture for a flawless, seamless blend. The finely milled powder feels almost air-like on the skin, ensuring comfortable wear all day long. Suitable for all skin types.

How to use: Apply to the hollows of your cheeks for a defined, contoured appearance. For a naturally sun-kissed glow, lightly dust across your cheeks, forehead, nose bridge and chin. 

Ingredients: MICA (CI 77019)**; KAOLIN; CALCIUM CARBONATE; LAUROYL LYSINE; ZINC STEARATE; SILICA; CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; LECITHIN; CAPRYLYL GLYCOL; TOCOPHEROL; ARGANIA SPINOSA (ARGAN) KERNEL OIL*; GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL; AROMA; CERA ALBA (BEESWAX)*; GLYCOLIPIDS; AQUA; GLYCERIN; POLYGLYCERYL-3 DIISOSTEARATE; MAGNESIUM STEARATE; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) EXTRACT; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) GERM EXTRACT; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; LINALOOL***; GERANIOL***; GERANYL ACETATE***; VANILLIN; CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) **; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES)**; CI 77492 (IRON OXIDES)**; CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES)**

*Ingredients from organic farming
**Pure mineral pigments
***From natural essential oils

100% Natural origin of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Moonlight Soft Glow Mineral Highlighter, #1 Stardust 6g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Mineral Highlighter
Price: 24.90

While nothing beats the magical glow of moonlit skin, this natural highlighter comes delightfully close. 

Infused with ultra-refined, light-reflecting mineral particles, it delivers a soft, iridescent finish that looks just like your skin — only more luminous. The talc-free formula with skin-loving ingredients blends effortlessly, adapting to your skin’s texture. Suitable for fair to medium skin. 

How to use: Sweep onto the high points of your face — cheekbones, brow bones, bridge of the nose and cupid’s bow — using a brush or fingertips. Blend gently for a soft glow or layer for a more intense radiance. 

Ingredients: MICA (CI 77019)**; LAUROYL LYSINE; ZINC STEARATE; SILICA; CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; LECITHIN; CAPRYLYL GLYCOL; TOCOPHEROL; ARGANIA SPINOSA (ARGAN) KERNEL OIL*; GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL*; AROMA; CERA ALBA (BEESWAX)*; MAGNESIUM STEARATE; AQUA; GLYCERIN; POLYGLYCERYL-3 DIISOSTEARATE; GLYCOLIPIDS; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) EXTRACT; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) GERM EXTRACT; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; LINALOOL***; GERANIOL***; GERANYL ACETATE***; VANILLIN; CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) **; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES)**; CI 77492 (IRON OXIDES)**; CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES)**

*Ingredients from organic farming
**Pure mineral pigments
***From natural essential oils

100% Natural origin of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Air Equal Soft Silk Mineral Powder, #2 Beige, 9g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Mineral Powder
Price: 28.90

Made by tinted makeup experts, this weightless mineral powder is created to care for your skin as it banishes shine, diffuses the look of pores and smooths fine lines.

Like a soft-focus filter for your complexion, the ultra-fine formula glides onto skin effortlessly, setting makeup for extended wear and giving an invisible, airbrushed finish.
 
Enriched with natural retouching particles, white clay and vitamin E, to grant a comfortable all-day wear while protecting the skin from external stressors.

Dermatologically tested. Free from titanium dioxide and talc.

How to use: Apply powder all over the face with a brush or puff to set makeup.

Ingredients: MICA (CI 77019)***; CALCIUM CARBONATE; KAOLIN; LAUROYL LYSINE; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) STARCH; ZINC STEARATE; SILICA; CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; ARGANIA SPINOSA (ARGAN) KERNEL OIL*; CAPRYLYL GLYCOL; CELLULOSE; TOCOPHEROL; GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL*; AROMA; MAGNESIUM STEARATE; GLYCOLIPIDS; AQUA; GLYCERIN; POLYGLYCERYL-3 DIISOSTEARATE; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) EXTRACT; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) GERM EXTRACT; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; LINALOOL**; GERANIOL**; GERANYL ACETATE**; VANILLIN; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES); CI 77492 (IRON OXIDES); CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES)***

*Ingredients from organic farming
**From natural essential oils
***Pure mineral pigments

100% Natural origin of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA Air Equal Soft Silk Mineral Powder, #2 Fair, 9g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Mineral Powder
Price: 28.90

Made by tinted makeup experts, this weightless mineral powder is created to care for your skin as it banishes shine, diffuses the look of pores and smooths fine lines.

Like a soft-focus filter for your complexion, the ultra-fine formula glides onto skin effortlessly, setting makeup for extended wear and giving an invisible, airbrushed finish.
 
Enriched with natural retouching particles, white clay and vitamin E, to grant a comfortable all-day wear while protecting the skin from external stressors.

Dermatologically tested. Free from titanium dioxide and talc.

entry.title: MÁDARA Magnetic Blush Mineral Cheek Blusher, #1 Fierce Flame, 6g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Blush
Price: 24.90

From vibrant red beet juice to subtle high-tech powder formulas, blush has remained a timeless classic throughout the decades and trends. This satin matte blush blends seamlessly with your complexion for a natural, skin-like flush that barely looks made up. The talc-free formula features glycolipid-coated mineral pigments that adapt to your skin's unique texture, delivering a flawlessly smooth finish for the most natural-looking blush. 

How to use: Diffuse a small amount on the cheeks, nose and eyelids for a naturally flushed look. Layer on the cheeks for a lifted appearance. 

Ingredients: MICA (CI 77019)**; CALCIUM CARBONATE; KAOLIN; LAUROYL LYSINE; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) STARCH; ZINC STEARATE; SILICA; CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; ARGANIA SPINOSA (ARGAN) KERNEL OIL*; CAPRYLYL GLYCOL; CELLULOSE; TOCOPHEROL; GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL; MAGNESIUM STEARATE; AQUA; GLYCERIN; GLYCOLIPIDS; POLYGLYCERYL-3 DIISOSTEARATE; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) EXTRACT; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) GERM EXTRACT; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; AROMA; LINALOOL***; GERANIOL***; GERANYL ACETATE***; VANILLIN; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES)**; CI 77492 (IRON OXIDES)**; CI 77742 (MANGANESE VIOLET)**

*Ingredients from organic farming
**Pure mineral pigments
***From natural essential oils

100% Natural origin of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Price: 24.90

This satin matte blush blends seamlessly with your complexion for a natural, skin-like flush that barely looks made up. The talc-free formula features glycolipid-coated mineral pigments that adapt to your skin's unique texture, delivering a flawlessly smooth finish for the most natural-looking blush.

entry.title: MÁDARA Magnetic Blush Mineral Cheek Blusher, #2 Cold Cheeks, 6g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Blush
Price: 24.90

From vibrant red beet juice to subtle high-tech powder formulas, blush has remained a timeless classic throughout the decades and trends. This satin matte blush blends seamlessly with your complexion for a natural, skin-like flush that barely looks made up. The talc-free formula features glycolipid-coated mineral pigments that adapt to your skin's unique texture, delivering a flawlessly smooth finish for the most natural-looking blush.

entry.title: MÁDARA The Eye Pencil Black 1g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Eye Pencil
Price: 16.90

Formulated with rich mineral pigments, this natural certified eye pencil delivers vibrant colour and a smooth application to help you create any eye makeup look you desire. Its long-lasting, creamy formula glides onto the skin effortlessly without tugging or pulling, making it ideal for creating smudged smoky eyes or defining the eye shape. 

Why you'll love it.

  • Long-lasting formula
  • Creamy texture
  • 0% synthetic colourants
  • Dermatologically and ophthalmologically tested
  • Fragrance allergen-free

The Eye Pencil features a wooden barrel and a recyclable plastic cap while the box is made from sustainably sourced paper.

How to use: Apply it directly to the waterline for a more dramatic look. To open and elongate the eyes, draw it close to the lash line. 

Ingredients: CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES); C10-18 TRIGLYCERIDES; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL*; COPERNICIA CERIFERA CERA*; EUPHORBIA CERIFERA CERA; HYDROGENATED CASTOR OIL; MICA (CI 77019); TOCOPHEROL; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL; ASCORBYL PALMITATE

*Ingredients from Organic Farming

100% Natural origin of total
16% Organic of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA The Eye Pencil Brown 1g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Eye Pencil
Price: 16.90

Formulated with rich mineral pigments, this natural certified eye pencil delivers vibrant colour and a smooth application to help you create any eye makeup look you desire. Its long-lasting, creamy formula glides onto the skin effortlessly without tugging or pulling, making it ideal for creating smudged smoky eyes or defining the eye shape.

Ingredients: CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; C10-18 TRIGLYCERIDES; CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES); RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL*; COPERNICIA CERIFERA CERA*; HYDROGENATED CASTOR OIL; CI 77492 (IRON OXIDES); EUPHORBIA CERIFERA CERA*; MICA (CI 77019); CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES); TOCOPHEROL; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL; ASCORBYL PALMITATE

*Ingredients from Organic Farming

100% Natural origin of total
15% Organic of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.
COSMOS NATURAL certified

entry.title: MÁDARA The Brow Pencil Dark Brown 1g
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Brow Pencil
Price: 16.90

This creamy eyebrow pencil glides onto the skin smoothly, shaping your brows for a defined and polished look. Formulated with mineral pigments, providing long-lasting shades that blend seamlessly with the colour of your natural brow hairs. Ideal for drawing precise, hair-like strokes or for completely filling in your brows. 

Why you'll love it. 

  • Long-lasting formula
  • Creamy texture
  • 0% synthetic colourants
  • Dermatologically and ophthalmologically tested
  • Fragrance allergen-free

The Brow Pencil features a wooden barrel and recyclable plastic caps while the box is made from sustainably sourced paper.

How to use: Comb and shape your eyebrows with the built-in spoolie, following their natural curve. Create a natural brow look by drawing soft, hair-like strokes. 

Ingredients: C10-18 TRIGLYCERIDES; CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; COPERNICIA CERIFERA CERA*; CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES); EUPHORBIA CERIFERA CERA; HYDROGENATED CASTOR OIL; RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL*; MICA (CI 77019); CI 77891 (TITANIUM DIOXIDE) ; CI 77492 (IRON OXIDES); CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES); TOCOPHEROL; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL; ASCORBYL PALMITATE

*Ingredients from Organic Farming

100% Natural origin of total
17% Organic of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Vendor: MADARA
Type: Brow Pencil
Price: 16.90

This creamy eyebrow pencil glides onto the skin smoothly, shaping your brows for a defined and polished look. Formulated with mineral pigments, providing long-lasting shades that blend seamlessly with the colour of your natural brow hairs. Ideal for drawing precise, hair-like strokes or for completely filling in your brows.

entry.title: HEJ Organic Peptide Lip Treatment 8ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 5.90

Peptides moisturize your lips, make them shiny and make them look fuller. Castor oil and shea butter make the glazed look perfect. 

  • Glossy finish with care effect
  • Peptides ensure plump lips with a smoothing effect
  • Moisturizing thanks to rinizus oil and shea butter
  • Can also be used as an overnight treatment
  • 100% fragrance-free & vegan

How to use: Apply evenly to your lips. As an overnight treatment, you can leave a larger amount on overnight.

Ingredients: Ricinus Communis Seed Oil*, Hydroxystearic/Linolenic/Oleic Polyglycerides, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Euphorbia Cerifera Cera, Pentaerythrityl Tetraisostearate, Palmitoyl Hexapeptide-12, Raphanus Sativus Root Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Stearalkonium Hectorite, Propylene Carbonate, Citric Acid

entry.title: Magrada Peach Plump Lip Balm 10ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 10.90

Indulge your lips with this luscious lip balm, enriched with botanical oils for that perfect shine. If you crave maximum hydration and irresistibly soft, plump lips, this balm is just for you! Immerse yourself in the delightful notes of fresh peach, perfectly blended with nourishing candelilla wax, olive oil, castor oil, and vitamin E. Unique formula not only restores your lips’ natural softness but also locks in moisture for a fuller, more vibrant look. Plus, you can feel good about your choice—our fully recyclable packaging keeps your beauty routine eco-friendly.

How to use: Apply to clean lips as desired. Perfect for use as a nourishing lip balm before applying lipstick or as a glossy finish over lip balm or lip liner.

Ingredients: Hydroxystearic/Linolenic/OleicPolyglycerides, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Candelilla Cera, Polyglyceryl-3 Diisostearate, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Dipalmitoyl Hydroxyproline, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Linalool, Limonene

Ingredients of natural origin: 100%

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | vegan | cruelty-free | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Blueberry Tinted Lip Balm 10ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 10.90

This balm's delightful lightweight formula melts seamlessly into your lips, leaving behind a gorgeous blueberry hue and a radiant, natural shine. Embrace beauty while making a conscious choice—crafted from 100% vegan ingredients and wrapped in eco-friendly packaging, this balm is truly a beauty essential.

How to use: Apply to clean lips as desired. Perfect for use as a nourishing lip balm before applying lipstick or as a glossy finish over lip balm or lip liner.

Ingredients: Hydroxystearic/Linolenic/OleicPolyglycerides, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Polyglyceryl-3 Diisostearate, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Candelilla Cera, Aroma (Flavor), CI 77019/Mica, Dipalmitoyl Hydroxyproline, CI77163/Bismuth Oxychloride, CI 77491/Iron Oxide, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Stevia Rebaudiana (Sweetleaf) Extract

Ingredients of natural origin: 100%

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | vegan | cruelty-free | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: MÁDARA Plum Plum Lip Balm 15ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Lip Balms
Price: 10.40

Intense hydration and heavenly softness from the very first application. Use alone for a sheer finish or as a base for your favorite lipstick. Lips stay soft, protected and hydrated to perfection. Formulated with deeply moisturising jojoba oil, shea butter and plum oil.

How to use: Apply to clean, dry lips. Reapply whenever necessary. Use alone for a sheer finish or as a base for your favourite lipstick.

Ingredients: Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Sorbitan olivate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Prunus Domestica (Plum) Seed Oil, Aroma, Tocopherol, Calendula Officinalis (Calendula) Flower Extract, Chamomilla Recutita (Camomile) Flower Extract, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) Fruit Extract, Propolis Extract, Stevia Rebaudiana Extract, CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), Limonene, Linalool

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.
